result.stdout:
Yadd CLI is a tool for managing relational database changes.

Usage: yadd.dll [command] [options]

Options:

  -v | --version
  Show version information

Commands:

  add            Adds a script to staging area
  branch         Manages Branches.
  commit         Commits staging area
  find-baseline  Searches a baseline matching database state
  history        Displays repository content
  info
  init           Initialize a repository
  remove         Removes a script from staging area
  schema         Manages Database Schema.
  show-stage     Lists scripts in staging area
  tag            Manages Tags.
  upgrade        Migrate database

Use "yadd.dll [command] --help" for more information about a command.

commands.payload:
Yadd CLI is a tool for managing relational database changes.

Usage: yadd.dll [command] [options]

Options:

  -v | --version
  Show version information

Commands:

  add            Adds a script to staging area
  branch         Manages Branches.
  commit         Commits staging area
  find-baseline  Searches a baseline matching database state
  history        Displays repository content
  info
  init           Initialize a repository
  remove         Removes a script from staging area
  schema         Manages Database Schema.
  show-stage     Lists scripts in staging area
  tag            Manages Tags.
  upgrade        Migrate database

Use "yadd.dll [command] --help" for more information about a command.

result.stdout:
Manages Branches.

Usage: yadd.dll branch [command]

Commands:

  list       Lists existing branches
  remove     Deletes an existing branch
  switch-to  Switches to a new branch

Use "yadd.dll branch [command] --help" for more information about a command.
